name: STARWOOD PROPERTY TRUST, INC.
business: Starwood Property Trust is a real estate investment trust that originates, acquires, finances, and manages mortgage loans and other real estate investments in the United States, Europe, and Australia. It operates through four segments: Commercial and Residential Lending, Infrastructure Lending, Property, and Investing and Servicing. The company seeks to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns to its investors through dividends and capital appreciation.

exposures.sentence: $192.9 million first mortgage bridge loan secured by a pre-leased data center located in Texas, of which the Company funded $21.0 million.
Infrastructure Lending Segment engages primarily in originating, acquiring, financing and managing infrastructure debt investments.
First priority infrastructure loans and HTM securities $2,942,115 ... Collateral Type: Power 56.9%

Our residential loans are secured by a first mortgage lien on residential property and primarily consist of non-agency residential loans that are not guaranteed by any U.S. Government agency or federally chartered corporation.
